title: 要排多久啊？
description_uz: «Bir piyola sut choyi uchun shuncha kutish arziydimi?» — Ikki do'st mashhur sut choyi do'koni oldida navbatda turib, ichimlik tanlaydi va to'lovni hal qiladi. Bu suhbat kutish vaqtini so'rash, ta'm tanlash va sabrli bo'lishni mashq qiladi — marvarid sut choyi va mevali choy. Yengil, kundalik mavzu va foydali so'zlar. Soya o'qish va rol o'ynash uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Стоит ли так долго ждать ради одного стакана молочного чая?» — Двое друзей стоят в очереди у популярной чайной, выбирают напитки и решают вопрос с оплатой. Беседа тренирует вопросы о времени ожидания, выбор вкуса и терпение — молочный чай с жемчужинами и фруктовый чай. Лёгкая повседневная тема и полезная лексика. Идеальна для затенения и ролевой игры.
description_en: «Is it worth waiting this long for one cup of milk tea?» — Two friends queue at a popular milk tea shop, choose their drinks, and sort out payment. The chat practices asking about wait time, choosing flavors, and being patient—bubble milk tea and fruit tea. A light, everyday topic with handy words. Ideal for shadowing and role-play.

sentences.text_original: 这家奶茶店怎么这么多人？
sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiā nǎichá diàn zěnme zhème duō rén?
sentences.text_translation: Bu sut choyi do'konida nega bunchalik ko'p odam?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Почему в этой чайной столько народу?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why are there so many people at this milk tea shop?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 听说很好喝，我们排队吧。
sentences.pinyin: Tīngshuō hěn hǎohē, wǒmen páiduì ba.
sentences.text_translation: Juda mazali deyishadi, keling navbatga turaylik.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Говорят, очень вкусно, давай встанем в очередь.
sentences.text_translation_en: I heard it's really good — let's get in line.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: How long do we have to wait?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 看前面有七八个人，大概十分钟吧。
sentences.pinyin: Kàn qiánmiàn yǒu qī bā gè rén, dàgài shí fēnzhōng ba.
sentences.text_translation: Oldinda yetti-sakkiz kishi bor, taxminan o'n daqiqadir.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Впереди человек семь-восемь, примерно минут десять.
sentences.text_translation_en: There are seven or eight people ahead — about ten minutes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà hái xíng, bú suàn tài jiǔ.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ну, это нормально, не так уж долго.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's okay then — not too long.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你想喝什么？先看看菜单。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng hē shénme? Xiān kànkan càidān.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что ты будешь пить? Сначала посмотрим меню.
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you want to drink? Let's look at the menu first.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng hē zhēnzhū nǎichá, nǐ ne?
sentences.text_translation: Men marvarid sut choyi ichmoqchiman, sen-chi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я хочу молочный чай с жемчужинами, а ты?
sentences.text_translation_en: I want bubble milk tea — how about you?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yào yì bēi shuǐguǒ chá, shǎo táng.
sentences.text_translation: Men bir stakan mevali choy olaman, kam shakar.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я возьму стакан фруктового чая, поменьше сахара.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'll have a fruit tea, less sugar.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Kuài dào wǒmen le, zhǔnbèi hǎo qián.
sentences.text_translation_en: We're almost up — get your money ready.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不用现金，用手机付就行。
sentences.pinyin: Búyòng xiànjīn, yòng shǒujī fù jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation: Naqd pul shart emas, telefonda to'lasang bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Наличные не нужны, можно оплатить телефоном.
sentences.text_translation_en: No need for cash — you can just pay with your phone.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 排队的时候时间过得好慢。
sentences.pinyin: Páiduì de shíhou shíjiān guò de hǎo màn.
sentences.text_translation: Navbatda turganda vaqt juda sekin o'tadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Когда стоишь в очереди, время тянется так медленно.
sentences.text_translation_en: When you're waiting in line, time goes by so slowly.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Shì a, dàn hǎo dōngxi zhídé děng.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, lekin yaxshi narsa kutishga arziydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, но хорошее стоит того, чтобы подождать.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, but good things are worth waiting for.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhōngyú dào wǒmen le, nǐ lái diǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Nihoyat navbatimiz keldi, sen buyurtma ber.
sentences.text_translation_en: Finally, it's our turn — you order.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好，一杯珍珠奶茶，一杯水果茶，水果茶少糖，谢谢。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, yì bēi zhēnzhū nǎichá, yì bēi shuǐguǒ chá, shuǐguǒ chá shǎo táng, xièxie.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, bir stakan marvarid sut choyi, bir stakan mevali choy, mevali choy kam shakar, rahmat.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, один молочный чай с жемчужинами, один фруктовый чай, фруктовый — поменьше сахара, спасибо.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, one bubble milk tea, one fruit tea, the fruit tea with less sugar, thanks.
sentences.speaker: B
